NanoBK DNS Apply — Summary
Status: ready for confirmation

Planned changes:
  Create: 1
  Update: 1
  No change: 0
  Conflict: 0

Target:
  Domain: ex***e.com
  Hostname: pr***y.ex***e.com
  IPv4: 203.0.113.xxx
  IPv6: 2001:db8:…

What will happen:
  NanoBK will create or update DNS records after confirmation.

What will NOT happen:
  No records will be deleted.
  No unowned records will be overwritten.
  No proxied records will be converted.
  No Cloudflare Tunnel, Access, DNS-01, certificate, Worker, Bot, or Web Panel settings will be changed.

Cloudflare DNS will be changed only after confirmation.
